title: 3-page Russia integrated-strategy assessment (V1-V4 convergence)
public_claim: This packet ships a three-page submission-grade intelligence-style writing sample on Russia's integrated strategy of control and projection, plus the analytic framework, claim-calibration notes, and version history behind it.
distinctive_mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.
